[![image](https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Gyeon-Tire-Express-500-ml_1845_1_m_2178.jpg)](https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Gyeon-Tire-Express-500-ml_1845_1_lw_2178.jpg)

### Product Information

- Helps restore and protect tires and other rubber surfaces

- Water-based and can be applied wet or dry

- 10-15ml needed for a set of tires

- Clean your tires with the [Gyeon Tire Cleaner](https://www.detailedimage.com/Gyeon-M91/Tire-Cleaner-P1844/500-ml-S1/) first

- Product Code: GY-1566

- [Read full description](#product-description)

### Customer Reviews

100% of customers said that they would buy this item again

[Based upon 5 ratings](#product-reviews)

### Product Description

The Gyeon Tire Express is a water-based coating that will help you protect your tires with ease! Tire Express restores a like-new appearance of your tires and keeps them looking good with strong UV and hydrophobic protection. Being water based, it's extremely easy to apply and allows both a dry and wet application. It spreads on the surface very well with just one wipe and doesn't require any rubbing. To begin we highly recommend you clean your tires first with something like the [Gyeon Tire Cleaner](https://www.detailedimage.com/Gyeon-M91/Tire-Cleaner-P1844/500-ml-S1/) to ensure the rubber is clean and the pores are open to accept Tire Express. Apply a thin coating for a very deep, natural and matte look. It builds a self-cleaning layer that helps to keep the tire clean. This allows you to not only restore your faded tires, but keep them looking deep and dark for longer than traditional tire dressings! If you are looking to protect and restore your tires, the Gyeon Tire Express is an awesome choice!



**Tip:** To get the most out of the product, use it on a damp tire right after the wash. Spread it evenly and let dry. A subtle, factory fresh look will be the result.



**Consumption:** 10-15ml per set



**Durability:** About 2 washes

### Videos

#### Gyeon Q M Tire Express

![image](https://img.youtube.com/vi/-1nb9t6lD4w/hqdefault.jpg)

### From The Label

#### Product Description

Quick and easy tyre dressing. Dry and wet use possible. Provides a natural, satin look. Repels dirt.


**


- Repels dirt

- Factory fresh look

- Dry and wet application
**


#### Directions

Clean the tyre with Q2M TireCleaner. Rinse well. Let excess of water evaporate. Use on a damp or completely dry tyre. Ensure even application with Q2M TireApplicator. Let dry for 15 minutes. ** KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN. **

### Customer Reviews

Reviewed by Cesar Antonio C. on 4/15/2021

[* DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

Love that finish! And the easy application

Reviewed by Joe W. on 5/9/2019

[** DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

Tire Express by GYEON is a step in the right direction for an easy to use water based tire dressing. It's application is not hard and can be done in minutes. However the durability of this product is not impressive. With the understanding of being a water based product, and the idea of having something quick, I would have like to seen the product last a little bit longer than a day or two. The initial application looks great, however, by the time day three comes around the product is completely gone; and this is with two coats. With that being said, as long as detailers are aware of the short lifespan of the product, by all means, Tire Express is a good product that gives a crisp look to a fresh detail.

Reviewed by Roger R. on 1/21/2019

[** DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

I got in on the pre-order of this product, as well as the Gyeon tire cleaner and couldn't wait to try this out.

After I washed my car I dried the tires and although they looked dry I knew they weren't so great time to try out Tire Express. I will say my base product, Hydrosilex Slick was still holding up well but with upcoming bad weather I wanted to give them a boost.

I applied a single coat. This product is a thick, gray product, very similar in consistency to the Hydrosilex Slick I already had on there. When initially applying it its gray and even after working it in you've gotta let it soak in and leave the tire satin black in it's own. I went down to the garage a while later and it was all good, I may have applied it to thickly, remember, this product is brand new and this was first application. 

The finish left behind is excellent, VERY happy with it. I drove on some damp and salty roads today and they remained looking great, it was very cold too and these are Blizzak winter tires, very finicky when it comes to tire dressings, Tire Express is now 1 of 3 dressings in my collection that work on the Blizzaks!

I'm looking forward to trying Tire Express on dry tires too. Because its Gyeon I have high expectations here, so far...SOOOO GOOD!

[Read all customer reviews of Gyeon Tire Express](https://www.detailedimage.com/Gyeon-M91/Tire-Express-P1845/Reviews/)

[** Write your own review](https://www.detailedimage.com/Gyeon-M91/Tire-Express-P1845/Reviews/#write)
